text.title: Viral Metrics and K-factor Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
wait for >= 4 weeks of viral loop data
lock K = i * c definition in metrics-store
switch to weekly cohort K + 4w rolling
surface i, c on default dashboard

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=retention-adjusted-k
